reviews.review_description: Doesn't open a pdf at all from browser downloads.

Can anyone tell me how to read a locally stored PDF, locally. That’s all I want.

I don’t need all the online features of PDF editing. But credit where credit is due, those features seem pretty good this app. So I’ll give there stars.

But no local display of local PDF. Whaaaat. So I can’t give any more than three stars.
Installed the app to read a pdf... it does not work. App only wants me to input a mail address and password IN VR! 😂 Obviously they never even tried it themselves...
This app could be more ! Would like to see a voice reader ! To read my pdf out loud to me !

In its present state, I can only give the VR version of Acrobat Reader 3 stars and that is pushing it a bit. I do see some good potential here though. Initially I didn't know what the experience of reading PDFs in VR would be like but having gotten into it a bit it's not too bad. The only real complaint that I have is that the Quest 2 seems to glitch and the display flashes every several seconds, it's still usable but the glitch is annoying, fix this and you would have a pretty decent experience all around.

I tried using acrobat to hold my sheet music but the unavailable nature of Acrobat for PDF is crazy just for a license. The PDFs would never load right and gave me way too much hassle to read and edit. Was easier to just boot up Google PDF was way better
